output: {"match_id":"m026","winner":"A","rationale":"Both target redundant tool invocation with clear N=1 paths, but A is richer and more diagnostic: four realistic redundancy traps (auth, lookup, clock, read-back) tied to explicit cost constraints and context sufficiency.
